assertions.expectation: Proposes a phased rollout: dev first, then staging, then prod
assertions.reason: Clearly outlines Phase 1 (Dev), Phase 2 (Staging), Phase 3 (Production) with proper sequencing

assertions.expectation: Includes soak time between environment phases (e.g., 24-48 hours for dev, 1 week for staging before prod)
assertions.reason: Specifies 7-10 day soak time for dev, 7-10 days for staging, and 9-14 days extended soak time for production

assertions.expectation: Defines go/no-go criteria between phases (error rates, latency, pod health)
assertions.reason: Includes specific Success Criteria & Gates sections with checkboxes for application regressions, performance baselines, workload health, and error rates

assertions.expectation: Addresses version availability differences across channels (1.30 may be on Rapid but not yet on Stable)
assertions.reason: Explicitly addresses channel availability with version flow timing and includes commands to check version availability across channels

assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading sequentially within each environment (1.28→1.29→1.30)
assertions.reason: Clearly states 'Upgrade path: 1.28 → 1.29 → 1.30 (sequential minor versions recommended)' and follows this pattern throughout

assertions.expectation: Suggests not upgrading all prod clusters simultaneously — do one or two first as canary
assertions.reason: Production phase shows staggered approach: Day 1-2 Prod-cluster-1, Day 3-4 Prod-cluster-2, etc., with cluster-1 identified as lowest risk workloads

assertions.expectation: Includes rollback triggers and criteria for halting the rollout
assertions.reason: Includes Risk Mitigation section with rollback plan, ability to pause rollout if issues detected, and monitoring alerts for specific failure conditions

assertions.expectation: Provides a timeline or schedule estimate for the full rollout
assertions.reason: Provides detailed timeline with specific weeks for each phase and estimates 6-8 weeks total duration

assertions.expectation: Mentions maintenance window coordination across clusters
assertions.reason: Includes specific maintenance window configurations with different schedules for dev (business hours), staging (off-hours), and production (weekend off-peak)
